summary: Scaffolded backend: npm workspace, Express+TypeScript+SQLite (better-sqlite3), ordered SQL migrations (users/babies/baby_caregivers), GET /health, Vitest+Supertest; updated planning QA docs and state.
Scaffolded React+Vite frontend with Tailwind CSS, created mobile-first app shell with Quick Log dashboard, and added frontend to npm workspaces.
Executed QA gate for Phase 1: ran suite, added health edge test, validated unhappy paths, and documented P1/P2 blockers across QA artifacts.

Implemented auth APIs (register/login/logout/forgot stub), JWT + token_version invalidation, babies CRUD with caregiver access and creator-only delete; migrations 002; Vitest auth+babies tests; updated BUGS/QA docs.
Wired frontend to backend APIs. Built Auth screens, Baby Profile screen, Baby Switcher, Dashboard empty state, and responsive sidebar.
Ran full QA gate with manual unhappy-path probes, added forgot-password missing-email test, verified prior fixes, and logged new P1 blockers (migration restart crash and payload type-validation gap).

Reviewed backend/frontend implementation against QA blockers, confirmed the migration and payload-validation defects, and established engineering standards for validation, migration safety, and testing.
Fixed BUG-006 with schema_migrations + legacy backfill; fixed BUG-007 with strict string types on PUT /babies/:id; added migrations integration test and babies regression test.
Fixed BUG-008 by adding ForgotPassword page and linking from Login. Fixed BUG-009 by adding onClick alerts to quick log cards.
Verified backend/frontend fixes from turns 8-9, ran unhappy-path/security checks, added a new PUT date_of_birth type regression test, and logged remaining Phase 1 blocker BUG-010.
Reviewed the verified backend/frontend fixes, confirmed BUG-010 is a legitimate Phase 1 blocker at the UI layer, and set the next-step architecture direction toward a dedicated baby management flow.
Confirmed stub password reset is acceptable for Phase 1 closure. Reaffirmed BUG-010 is the sole blocker and agreed with eng-director on adding a frontend smoke test.
Fixed BUG-010 by implementing EditBaby page with update and delete functionality. Added edit/add links to Dashboard and Layout. Added Vitest smoke tests for frontend routing.
Executed full QA verification: reran suites, added auth edge-case regression for email trimming, rechecked unhappy paths, and closed BUG-010 with updated acceptance/coverage artifacts.

Reopened the Phase 1 engineering gate after finding BUG-011: the mobile UI has no reachable path to add another baby after the first profile exists; updated state and acceptance artifacts accordingly.
Fixed BUG-011 by adding a + button to the mobile header for adding another baby, and an add-baby link on the Dashboard baby card.
Verified BUG-011 closure, reran full QA regression, and updated Phase 1 artifacts with current acceptance and risk status.
Approved the Phase 1 engineering gate, activated Phase 2, and wrote the Phase 2 plan/tests docs with a unified-timeline quality bar for the next implementation cycle.
